subcodes.title: Risala Furu' al-'Adliyya (Epistle of Justice: Branches)
subcodes.first_line: God hath enjoined upon mankind certain ordinances prior to the act of prayer, and among them is His decree that He imposeth no burden upon any soul beyond its capacity, nor is anyone to be compelled in any matter [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. و لقد فرض الله علی الناس قبل الصلوة بعضاً من الاحکام و هی ان الله لا یکلف لاحد الا دون قوته و ما یجبر علی احد لشیء
subcodes.subjects: @law of obligatory prayer, @law of Huququ'llah, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @business; financial; property matters, @justice and wrath of God
